title: Fix missing assignment for wide unpacked structs

features.name: wide unpacked struct with bit field
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct containing a bit field wider than 128 bits

features.name: struct member selection on assignment RHS
features.description: Code should include assigning a struct member (accessed via struct selection) to a logic variable

features.name: struct member assignment on LHS with wide value
features.description: Code should include assigning a large hex value to a struct member with wide bit field
